race.comment: A competitive Guineas. WATSON (3) was tracking nicely before leading and folding in the Group 3 Eskimo Stakes at Randwick. Has won a Randwick trial easily since and will hit this race at peak fitness. Will race forward from an inside barrier and with Tim Clark sticking aboard is sure to give a big sight. AERODROME (1) was expected to win an 88 at Randwick first-up but is fitness gave out late beaten 2L.The longer sprint suits and he has plenty up his sleeve. Will have come on and should be right in it. TRANSCEND (10) is well up to this at best. Disappointed in a 78 at Randwick first up, but he maps well and Tommy Berry stays with him. Expect quick improvement. AZARAX (4) rates similarly on his first-up win in a 64 at Hawkesbury. Had come off Listed grade and is proven second-up.
